creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
I am a proof of God’s goodness.

It’s been almost 3 months since I was diagnosed with acute myeloid leukemia. And it came just in time when I had big plans in mind. 

I was shattered into pieces.
God fixed me back. 

It was a tough healing journey until I learned  to surrender all the pain and panic attacks to Him. I’m halfway through my treatment and I’m claiming complete healing because God tells me so. 🙏🏻

This post is dedicated to the people who are also facing challenging situations. Keep the faith. God fights our silent battles for us. 

P.S.
I’m very much grateful to my husband, family, friends, and work fam for being the most amazing support system. I’m also thankful to be taken care of by the best Doctor and healthcare staff at Mediclinic. And to everyone who stayed on my page and checked on me while I was taking a break from creating content, THANK YOU! 💕

#Healing #lifelately #ladyandhersweetescapes #DubaiBlogger #dubai #uae #UAEblogger

transcription.text: So I lift up my hands and praise you again and again Cause all that I have is a Hallelujah, Hallelujah And I know it's not much, but I've nothing else fit for a king
